creator: msnkipa@mail.ru
text:
I have motherboard (asus m2v-mx) wiht VAI VT8237A south bridge. When I
connect my SATA HDD to second master SATA I see in in bios, RAID utility
and can boot DOS from it, but I don`t see in FreeBSD! Onle ad10 - which
is primary SATA are detecting. If hardware RAID is configured, kernel
wrote that in is broken, and onle one hdd is avaliable.

What can i do in it situation? Bye new SATA RAID card?

PS: I try to connect different hdd from different vendors, but all of
them are SATAII. In the VT8237 we have SATAI
